page_metadata.biotools__summary: DendroNet is an approach to train neural networks in the context of evolutionary data. DendroNet explicitly accounts for the relatedness of the training/testing data, while allowing the model to evolve along the branches of the phylogenetic tree, hence accommodating potential changes in the rules that relate genotypes to phenotypes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DendroNet is an approach to train neural networks in the context of evolutionary data.
